# StudentsPlug

> EBSU's student knowledge hub — past questions, assignments, study notes, quizzes, news, market and games for Ebonyi State University students.

## Pages

- [Home](/): Latest student posts, novels, notes and feed.
- [News](/news): Daily EBSU and world headlines curated for students.
- [Faculties](/faculties): Browse EBSU faculties and departments.
- [Courses](/courses): Free university-level textbooks and OpenCourseWare.
- [Notes](/notes): Past questions, study notes and assignment helpers.
- [Books](/books): Read free books in the library.
- [Market](/market): Buy and sell with verified students.
- [Games](/games): Trivia, puzzles and riddles between study sessions.
- [Tools](/tools): OCR scan, calculator, dictionary, QR and more.
- [EBSU Fees Guide](/guides/ebsu-fees): School fees and admission portal walkthrough.

## Optional

- [Chat](/chat): Plug AI study assistant.
